name: Patrick Murphy
subject: This won't take long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| I want to take 30 seconds to share this: Now that my Senate campaign is up and running, I want to take 30 seconds to share this:

We've started the campaign fast. I'm so honored to receive the support and endorsement of my friend, Governor Charlie Crist, my Congressional colleagues Ted Deutch, Lois Frankel, Alcee Hastings, and most of all YOU.

But our momentum will be lost if we don't close the first phase of our campaign with a big fundraising quarter.

The first deadline of our campaign is at midnight tonight. After midnight, contributions will no longer count towards this crucial first fundraising report.

**So, can I count on you to contribute to our campaign before midnight?**

**[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-match?refcode=ema_2015-03-31_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=5&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $35 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-match?refcode=ema_2015-03-31_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=35&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $50 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-match?refcode=ema_2015-03-31_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=50&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $100 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-match?refcode=ema_2015-03-31_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=100&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Chip in $250 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-match?refcode=ema_2015-03-31_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=250&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

**[Or click here to donate another amount.](http://act.murphyforflorida. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/murphy-match?refcode=ema_2015-03-31_b1_pm_ldnd&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

Thanks,

name: Anthony Kusich, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: Patrick's trying to reach you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Did you see Patrick's email earlier? Did you see Patrick's email earlier?

We only have hours until the first fundraising deadline of the entire campaign.

That's why Patrick asked for your help this morning, and that's why I'm asking for your help now.

We have no time to lose. This first fundraising report will show potential supporters, the pundits, and our opponents that we have the support to win.

**It 's crucial we start strong. And to do that, we need 97 supporters to step up for Patrick before midnight. Will you chip in?**

**Midnight Deadline: All gifts matched!**

_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._

**[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida.
